hooks.command: npx claude-code-templates@latest --agent=git/git-flow-manager --yes && npx claude-code-templates@latest --setting=statusline/git-branch-statusline --yes && npx claude-code-templates@latest --command=git/feature --yes && npx claude-code-templates@latest --command=git/release --yes && npx claude-code-templates@latest --command=git/hotfix --yes && npx claude-code-templates@latest --command=git/finish --yes && npx claude-code-templates@latest --command=git/flow-status --yes

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); cd "$cwd" 2>/dev/null; ref=$(git -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false symbolic-ref HEAD 2> /dev/null); branch=""; if [ -n "$ref" ]; then branch="(${ref#refs/heads/})"; fi; time=$(date +%H:%M); printf "\033[0;31m%s %s\033[0;33m %s\033[0m" "$time" "$cwd" "$branch"
